chapter.title: Added medical recipes and notation on classical coinage
chapter.note: Contains Latin and Spanish medical recipes; information on classical Greek and Roman coinage

chapter.title: Solinus, Collectanea rerum mirabilium sive Polyhistoria
chapter.rubric: Iulii Solini grammatici polyhistor ab ipso editus
chapter.author: Iulii Solini

chapter.title: Orosius, Historia adversus paganos (excerpt)
chapter.note: This excerpt contains the geographical treatise from the first chapter of the "Historia"
An addition contemporary to the manuscript is found on fol. 29v: lines 28-41
chapter.author: Orosius, Paulus

chapter.title: Pseudo-Alexander, Epistola regis Macedonum ad Dindimum regem Bragmanorum (excerpt)
chapter.rubric: Epistola alexandri Regis macedonum ad dindimum Regem bragmanorum
chapter.author: Alexandri

chapter.title: Pseudo-Alexander, Epistola Alexandri Regis Macedonum ad Aristotilem magistrum (excerpt)
chapter.note: Fols. 48v-49r: considerable annotations contemporary to the manuscript
chapter.author: Alexandri

chapter.title: Pseudo-Alexander, Res Gestae Alexandri Macedonis (excerpt)
chapter.note: Text encompasses variant readings and omissions; lacks portions of I.7, I.9 and completely without I.12
chapter.author: Alexandri

chapter.title: Justinus, Epitome in libros Pompei Trogi (excerpt)
chapter.rubric: Incipiunt gesta alexandri magni. Excepta de trogo pompeio
chapter.author: Justinus, Marcus Junianus

chapter.title: Walter of Châtillon, Alexandreis (excerpt)
chapter.incipit: Si lis inciderit te iudice dirige libra
chapter.note: Addition of fourteen lines contemporary to the manuscript
chapter.author: Walter of Châtillon

chapter.title: Added medical recipes in Spanish
chapter.note: Spanish medical recipes for various ailments
